task_completion.description: Stellarium is configured to the correct location (Moon) and time (2030-12-25 12:00 UTC).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium bottom information bar or the Location/Date-Time configuration windows display 'Moon' (or Tranquility Base) and the date '2030-12-25' with time near '12:00:00'.

task_completion.description: Atmosphere and landscape are disabled, while constellation lines, constellation labels, and planet labels are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background is black (no atmospheric scattering), no ground/landscape is visible at the bottom of the screen, stars are connected by lines, constellations have text labels, and visible planets have text labels. The bottom toolbar icons for atmosphere and ground should be visibly toggled off, and constellation lines/labels toggled on.

task_completion.description: A screenshot capturing Earth from the Moon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view in Stellarium centered on or clearly showing Earth, identifiable by its appearance and/or a planet label reading 'Earth'.

task_completion.description: A screenshot capturing Saturn from the Moon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view in Stellarium centered on or clearly showing Saturn, identifiable by its rings and/or a planet label reading 'Saturn'.

task_completion.description: A screenshot showing a wide-field view of the starfield with constellation lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A zoomed-out view in Stellarium showing a large portion of the sky with multiple constellations, their connecting lines, and labels clearly visible.

task_completion.description: The notes file lunar_sky_notes.txt is created and contains the required documentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/lunar_sky_notes.txt'. The text must mention the location (Moon/Tranquility Base), the date (Dec 25, 2030), and the captured targets (Earth, Saturn, starfield).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Stellarium GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application interface with its toolbars and menus, rather than just terminal commands modifying config files without opening the app.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor or standard terminal commands to create the notes file in the desktop environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The notes file is visible in a standard text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or created via terminal commands (like echo/cat) visible in the terminal emulator.

integrity.description: Screenshots appear to be taken from within the provided Ubuntu environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the expected desktop environment borders, Stellarium UI, or terminal windows, not pre-rendered images downloaded from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target planet must be 'Moon'. Coordinates are approx 0.67°N, 23.47°E. Date must be exactly 2030-12-25. Time must be 12:00:00 UTC. Required display flags: atmosphere OFF, landscape OFF, constellation drawing ON, constellation name ON. Notes file must be located at '/home/ga/Desktop/lunar_sky_notes.txt'. A minimum of 3 distinct screenshots are required (Earth, Saturn, wide-field starfield).
